key_items: Bitcoin Price Crashes to $67,000 Range, Down 13% in a Week Amid ETF Outflows and Market Fears
Mt. Gox Moves 10,422 Bitcoin While Bitcoin Price Craters Below $69,000
BlackRock Moves $425 Million in Another Bitcoin Sale
reasoning: Bitcoin is experiencing significant technical breakdown with a 13% weekly decline, death cross formation, and substantial institutional selling pressure from both Mt. Gox liquidations and BlackRock deposit activity creating negative momentum. Offsetting factors include strategic accumulation by Strive (+$185M in BTC), bullish whale positioning on Bitfinex, and pro-crypto political tailwinds (Trump administration appointments), but near-term technical damage and ETF outflows dominate the 1-7 day outlook.
risks: Mt. Gox's scheduled 2026 repayments could trigger sustained selling pressure as the market absorbs the reality of ~141,686 BTC flowing to creditors, potentially cascading liquidations if BTC breaks below $65,000 support levels.
